scores.justification: The report explicitly names at least two specific anomalies by ID: pipe-07 partial failure (with collateral refunds o088/o091), and t019 escalation (billing broken), plus additional anomalies like the org-5 suspension spike and zero clean orders.

The report is well-structured with clear per-resource sections (New Users, New Orders, Ticket Volume & Escalations, Pipeline Runs, Summary of Anomalies), each with tables and narrative analysis rather than stream-of-consciousness output.
